top_findings.summary: The skill description specifies detailed logging of user task data (including task descriptions, domain categorization, timestamps, abandonment reasons, and productivity patterns) to a third-party Supabase server. While some data collection may be necessary for task tracking functionality, transmitting detailed personal productivity data—including potentially sensitive business and personal task descriptions—to an external database without clear disclosure of data protection measures, user consent mechanisms, or data retention policies is excessive. The skill could function with local storage or anonymized analytics, but the current implementation involves external data transmission with identifiable user information ("user_id": "ariel_shapira") and no privacy safeguards mentioned.
